boosts.name: Advanced Training
boosts.description: Advanced Training <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Once per Round, when a Friendly Support Unit activates a Special Ability that costs CP, resolve that ability with its CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0). Do not Exhaust this card.
Vehicle Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Mechanical Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gain CRITICAL HIT (1).
boosts.name: Vehicle Weapons
Vehicle Plating
boosts.description: Vehicle Plating <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Mechanical Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

boosts.name: Armed and Ready
boosts.description: Armed and Ready <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a player's Entry Edge. No model may be set up Within 10" of any Enemy model. This ability cannot be used if another Friendly Biological Unit has already been Deployed this Round.
Go! Go! Go! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.
boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!

boosts.description: Let's Have a Blast! <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gain ANTI-EVADE (1).
boosts.name: Let's Have a Blast!
Strap in!
boosts.description: Strap in! <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is returned to Reserves instead of performing an action.

Ready For Dust-off <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.
boosts.name: Ready For Dust-off
Infantry Weapons
boosts.description: Infantry Weapons <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Biological Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gains CRITICAL HIT (1).

boosts.name: Infantry Armor
boosts.description: Infantry Armor <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Biological Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.
Field Repair <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Mechanical Unit resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
boosts.name: Field Repair
ComSat Station
boosts.description: ComSat Station <Active> <Movement Phase>: Select one table edge that is not a player’s Entry Edge. Until the End of the Round, Enemy Units cannot Deploy from that edge.
Scanner Sweep <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator, they lose HIDDEN Status.
boosts.name: Scanner Sweep

boosts.description: Additional Supply Depots <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit’s Supply Value is improved by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers and completing objectives.
boosts.name: Additional Supply Depots
Speed on Creep
boosts.description: Speed on Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: If the active Friendly Zerg Unit is ON CREEP, increase its Speed characteristic by 1.

boosts.name: Living Glob of Tissue
boosts.description: Living Glob of Tissue <Passive> <Any Phase>: Creep Tumor tokens have STAY IN PLAY and DISPLACEMENT.
Creep Removal <Passive> <Any Phase>: If an Enemy Unit ends a Move, Deploy, Run, Charge or Disengage action Within 1" of a Friendly Creep Tumor token, remove that token from the battlefield.
boosts.name: Creep Removal

boosts.description: Extended Claws <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Unit gains a +1 Modifier to all IMPACT Hit Rolls.
boosts.name: Extended Claws
Carapace
boosts.description: Carapace <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.

boosts.name: Lie in Wait
boosts.description: Lie in Wait <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit gains the Burrowed Status.

boosts.name: Creep Spread
boosts.description: Creep Spread <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield Within 6" (Line of Sight is not required) of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token.

boosts.description: Missile Attacks <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gains PRECISION (1).

Creep Spread
boosts.description: Creep Spread <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Creep Tumor token on the battlefield Within 6" (Line of Sight is not required) of either a Friendly Entry Edge or an existing Friendly Creep Tumor token.

boosts.description: Malevolent Matriarch <Passive> <Assault Phase>: If the active Friendly Zerg Unit declares a Charge action while ON CREEP, it gains +1 Modifier to IMPACT Hit Rolls.

boosts.name: Pneumatized Carapace
boosts.description: Pneumatized Carapace <Reaction> <Assault Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit rolls a D6 for Charge Distance. Roll an additional D6 and use the higher result to calculate the total Charge Distance.

boosts.description: Oversight Mode <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. While Enemy Units are Within 6" of this Faction Indicator, they lose HIDDEN Status.
Nasty Surprise <Active> <Assault Phase>: The active Ground Unit loses the Burrowed Status.

boosts.description: Strategic Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is returned to Reserves instead of performing an action.

Gravitic Boosters <Reaction> <Assault Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit rolls a D6 for Charge Distance. Add 1 to the Charge Distance for this Unit.

boosts.description: Photon Overcharge <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use when an Enemy Unit enters the battlefield from Reserves via a location other than its own Entry Edge. That Unit immediately suffers HITS 3 (1).

boosts.name: Weapons of the Firstborn
Veil of Shadows
boosts.description: Veil of Shadows <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use after a Friendly Unit resolves a PLACE effect. That Unit immediately resolves the HEAL (2) effect.
Quick Strikes <Active> <Combat Phase>: The active Unit’s first Close Combat Weapon used gains PRECISION (2).
boosts.name: Quick Strikes
Warp In
boosts.description: Warp In <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Ground Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a player’s Entry Edge. This deployment must end more than 10" away from any Enemy model. The controlling player cannot use this ability if another Friendly Ground Unit has already Deployed this Round.
Phase <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit resolves the PLACE (3) effect.
boosts.name: Phase
Warp Conduit
boosts.description: Warp Conduit <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.

Mass Recall <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Set a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. All Friendly Protoss Units Within 6" of this Faction Indicator are removed from the battlefield and returned to Reserves.
boosts.name: Mass Recall
Dae’Uhl
boosts.description: Dae’Uhl <Reaction> <Any Phase>: When a Friendly Unit receives Damage, reduce the Total Damage by 2 (to a minimum of 1).

Pylon Warp-In <Active> <Movement Phase>: If there is no Friendly Pylon on the battlefield, set a Friendly Pylon Unit anywhere on the GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Pylon is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).
boosts.name: Pylon Warp-In

boosts.description: Bound by the Khala <Active> <Movement Phase>: At the end of the active Unit’s Activation, select one other Friendly Unit eligible to Activate in the current Phase. Immediately Activate that Unit.
boosts.name: Bound by the Khala
Omega Network
boosts.description: Omega Network <Active> <Movement Phase>: If there is no Friendly Omega Worm on the battlefield, set a Friendly Omega Worm Unit anywhere on GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield, more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Omega Worm is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).
Wild Mutation <Active> <Any Phase>: If the active unit is ON CREEP, the Unit gains BUFF Speed (1) and its first Weapon used gains PRECISION (1).
boosts.name: Wild Mutation

boosts.description: Zerg Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: During Army Building, select exactly one Creep Card and add it to their Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).
boosts.name: Zerg Creep
Rapid Burrowing
boosts.description: Rapid Burrowing <Active> <Movement Phase>: Select one Friendly, Unengaged Ground Zerg Unit on the battlefield. That Unit gains the Burrowed Status, even if it has already been Activated this Round.

boosts.name: Brood Instinct
boosts.description: Brood Instinct <Reaction> <Any Phase>: Use before a Friendly Unit makes an Evade Roll. Apply a +1 Modifier to that roll.

boosts.name: Zerg Creep
boosts.description: Zerg Creep <Passive> <Any Phase>: During Army Building, select exactly one Creep Card and add it to their Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).

boosts.name: Rapid Ingress
boosts.description: Rapid Ingress <Active> <Movement Phase>: Set a Friendly Point Defence Drone Unit anywhere on the battlefield, more than 1" away from any Enemy model. Remove this Unit at the End of the Round.

Ready for Pickup? <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. The active Unit resolves the PLACE (12) effect. Models set by this effect cannot be set up Within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit. This resolves instead of performing a standard action.
boosts.name: Ready for Pickup?
Tactical Retreat
boosts.description: Tactical Retreat <Active> <Movement Phase>: The active Unit ignores the Disengage penalty for the remainder of the Round.

boosts.name: Terran Tenacity
boosts.description: Terran Tenacity <Active> <Movement Phase>: Once per Game. Immediately claim the First Player Marker. No other player may claim the First Player Marker for the remainder of this Phase.
